message:
fix: add cross-rig routing to ResetAgentBeadForReuse and CloseAndClearAgentBead (gt-2iqk5)

Apply the same ResolveRoutingTarget + NewWithBeadsDir pattern from
CreateOrReopenAgentBead to both methods. Without this, cross-rig agent
beads are looked up in the local rig database and silently fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
